---
title: "Annotated Equation"
format: 
  pdf:
    classoption: [landscape]
    papersize: legal
header-includes:
  - \usepackage{annotate-equations}
---


\begin{equation*}
  \eqnmark[violet]{node1}{\text{outcome}}
  \tikzmarknode{node2}{=}
  \eqnmarkbox[blue]{node3}{\beta_0}
  \eqnmark[black]{node4}{+}
  \eqnmarkbox[red]{node5}{\Sigma \beta \text{parenting}}
  \eqnmark[black]{node6}{+}
  \eqnmarkbox[teal]{node7}{\Sigma \beta \text{covariates}}
  \eqnmark[black]{node8}{+}
  \eqnmarkbox[purple]{node9}{u_{0j}}
  \eqnmark[black]{node10}{+}
  \eqnmarkbox[MidnightBlue]{node11}{\Sigma u_{kj} \times \text{parenting}}
\end{equation*}
\annotate[yshift=-1em]{below,left}{node1}{linear or dichotomous outcome} 
\annotate[yshift=1em]{left}{node3}{baseline} 
\annotate[yshift=-1em]{below,right}{node5}{parenting} 
\annotate[yshift=-2.5em]{below,right}{node7}{covariates}
\annotate[yshift=-2.5em]{below,right}{node9}{country level variation in outcome}
\annotate[yshift=-.75em]{below,right}{node11}{country level variation in associations}
